note: Three long-standing students never migrated to the Square or Stripe rails and continue to send class fees via PayPal Friends and Family. Amanda manually books these into QuickBooks every Sunday. PayPal monthly fees are zero on this account because all incoming transfers are F&F.

transactions.memo: 10-class punch card. Linda has done this since 2024.
Saturday Open drop-in. Same Rachel who also bought the Halloween 3-pack via Stripe and showed up in the Square Halloween sign-up sheet.
Online class package — Beth pays monthly via PayPal because her card kept failing the auto-pay setup.

note_on_processing_fees: F&F transfers carry no fee. QuickBooks reflects $0 in PayPal fees.
